title: Kernel lane / linked-systems map. In /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration, inspect scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh and scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh plus any nearby tests. Find exactly where non-zero adapter exit codes are collapsed to overall success, and suggest the minimal fail-...
summary_text: The masking happens in two spots: - In the linked runner, adapter failures are captured as data, not as process failure: - [scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh:190-206]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh:190) (`set +e`, `rc=$?`, `status="error"`). - Missing/invalid adapter is also converted to an error-result object and returns `0`: [scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh:174-187]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh:174). - The script computes `overall_status="error"` but still falls through without a non-zero exit: [scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh:250-254]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh:250), [268-289]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh:268). - In the parent orchestration, the linked runner itself is called under `set +e` and mapped to `linked_status`, then ignored for exit behavior: [scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh:1063-1074]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh:1063). Tests in-scope currently only verify linked opt-in/comment behavior, not failure propagation: - [tests/test-linked-systems-comment-policy.sh]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/tests/test-linked-systems-comment-policy.sh) - [tests/test-linked-systems-comment-opt-in.sh]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/tests/test-linked-systems-comment-opt-in.sh) - [tests/test-local-orchestration-gates.sh]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/tests/test-local-orchestration-gates.sh) (linked path check is opt-in-only). Minimal fail-closed change without changing existing JSON payload shape: 1. Keep all result JSON writes as-is. 2. In `run-linked-systems.sh`, after writing `integrated.json`/`summary.md`, add a final `exit` based on `overall_status` (e.g., `[[ "${overall_status}" == "error" ]] && exit 1`). 3. In `run-local-orchestration.sh`, preserve `linked_rc` and after all outputs are emitted, `exit 1` when `linked_status=="error"` (or `linked_rc != 0`), while still leaving `linked_systems_status`/notes in `integrated.json` unchanged.
